name: polymath-chat
description: Slack connector: MCP for channels/messages/threads + skill for posting incident comms updates with the right channel + thread routing.

slackBotToken.title: Slack bot token
slackBotToken.description: Bot token (xoxb-…) with chat:write, channels:read, groups:read, im:read, mpim:read scopes.

slackTeamId.title: Slack workspace (team) ID
slackTeamId.description: Workspace ID (starts with T…) that @modelcontextprotocol/server-slack requires to scope API calls.

defaultIncidentChannel.title: Default incident channel
defaultIncidentChannel.description: Channel name (e.g. "incidents") used as a fallback when no per-incident channel is supplied.

statuspageApiKey.title: Statuspage API key
statuspageApiKey.description: API key from Statuspage → User settings → API. Page-scoped; do not reuse personal keys across pages.

statuspagePageId.title: Statuspage page ID
statuspagePageId.description: Numeric page ID for the customer-facing status page (visible in the page URL).
